name: technical-knockout
description: Agent-native capability replication system for turning open-source architecture evidence into current-project implementation boundaries.

interface.shortDescription: Use TK to replicate capabilities from proven open-source architecture evidence.
interface.longDescription: Technical Knockout helps Codex turn open-source reports, comparisons, source cache, and build-vs-buy evidence into capability replication briefs, implementation boundaries, and verification plans for the current project.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Technical Knockout to build a capability replication brief for this project.
